member.name: T:CircuitBreaker.Adaptive.AdaptiveCircuitBreakerDecorator
member.summary: Wraps with adaptive rate/concurrency limits and telemetry.

member.name: T:CircuitBreaker.Adaptive.AdaptiveCircuitBreakerFactory
member.summary: Builds a Polly-backed circuit breaker wrapped with adaptive traffic control.

member.name: T:CircuitBreaker.Adaptive.AdaptiveConcurrencyLimiter
member.summary: In-flight request gate with a dynamically adjustable concurrency ceiling.

member.name: T:CircuitBreaker.Adaptive.AdaptiveRateLimiter
member.summary: Token-bucket rate limiter adjusted by health score (requests per second).

member.name: T:CircuitBreaker.Adaptive.AdaptiveTrafficController
member.summary: Background loop: telemetry → health score → actuator adjustments.

member.name: T:CircuitBreaker.Adaptive.AdaptiveTrafficControlOptions
member.summary: Configuration for adaptive traffic control and the decorator.

member.name: M:CircuitBreaker.Adaptive.DependencyInjection.ServiceCollectionExtensions.AddAdaptiveCircuitBreaker(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,CircuitBreaker.Core.CircuitBreakerOptions,CircuitBreaker.Adaptive.AdaptiveTrafficControlOptions,System.String)
member.summary: Registers as singleton . Disposes the decorator when the host stops via .

member.name: T:CircuitBreaker.Adaptive.HealthScoreCalculator
member.summary: Weighted health score from telemetry snapshots.

member.name: T:CircuitBreaker.Adaptive.IAdaptiveController
member.summary: Applies a traffic-control measure based on the current health score.
